name: FN FNC
description:
"It takes a strong man to deny what's infront of him"

"Stronger than you"

"Whatever you say, FNC. No matter what happens next, don't be too hard on yourself"

"Even now, after all you've done, you can still go home"

"...Lucky you"

_________________________________________________________________________________________________

....so uh, yo. I kinda died off ngl.

Apologies for not posting any of the bots I thought I'd be able to post (they haven't been updated yet) so I kinda technically lied in the last post, so uh, sorry about that :(

Anyways, Here's FNC from Girls' Frontline. the Arctic Warfare version, which I kinda had to change the lore around a bit, so it might or might not be canon, along with some sprinkles of Spec-ops: the line. I kinda also changed up the dates, so FNC is actually 32 in this (if Arctic warfare took place when she was 24) but since they're androids, you can technically change up their ages, just keep it legal please. Last thing is, I'm not sure when I can get another bot posted, I'll try by the end of this week but don't take that as a fact and more of a hope.


As always, If you have any constructive criticism or anything I need to change, comment em, I appreciate feedback. Anyways, enough rambling on, have a good day :)
creator: Shin0sy
